qas.q: What does the acronym LDRSHIP Stand for
qas.a:
Loyalty
Duty
Respect
Selfless-Service
Honor
Integrity
Personal-Courage
Bear true faith and allegiance to U.S Constitution, The army, Your unit, and other soldiers.
Treat people as they should they should be treated.
Put the welfare of the nation , the army, and your subordinates before your own
Live up to all the army values
Do what's right legally and morally
Face fear, danger or adversity(Physical or moral)
